description: Firestore data blueprint for ZenTask backend routes mounted in app.js.

collections.name: users
collections.description: Store user profiles, including their role, level, and XP.

fields.name: lastCheckInDate
fields.description: The date (YYYY-MM-DD) of the last check-in

fields.name: badges
fields.description: Array of badge IDs the user has earned

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: When the user document was created

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: When the user document was last updated

fields.name: bio
fields.description: Short user biography shown on profile

fields.name: following
fields.description: Number of users this account follows

fields.name: appSettings
fields.description: User appearance settings: { theme: light|dark|system, accentColor: blue|purple|green|orange|pink|slate }

fields.name: grammarProgress
fields.description: Grammar learning progress, completed stages and recent logs

fields.name: tensesProgress
fields.description: Tenses learning progress, completed stages and recent logs

collections.name: daily_tasks
collections.description: Admin-configured daily learning tasks.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Stable task key used by backend helpers, e.g. quiz_master or community_share

fields.name: xpPerItem
fields.description: Optional XP rewarded per item of progress

fields.name: point
fields.description: Legacy reward field used by some helpers

fields.name: type
fields.description: Task type: grammar, quiz, vocabulary, community, checkin, etc.

fields.name: total
fields.description: Total target amount for the task

collections.name: user_tasks
collections.description: Store progress of daily tasks per user.

fields.name: date
fields.description: The date string (YYYY-MM-DD) for the task

collections.name: user_daily_stats
collections.description: Daily per-user study stats and daily-task progress.

fields.name: studyMinutes
fields.description: Total study minutes on this date

fields.name: isCheckedIn
fields.description: Whether the user checked in on this date

fields.name: tasksCompleted
fields.description: Number of tasks completed on this date

fields.name: tasks
fields.description: Progress map keyed by task id, e.g. { quiz_master: 2 }

collections.name: flashcard_folders
collections.description: Folders used to group flashcard sets.

fields.name: color
fields.description: UI color class or color token

fields.name: sourceFolderId
fields.description: Original folder ID when copied from a friend share

collections.name: flashcard_sets
collections.description: Flashcard decks created by users, optionally inside flashcard folders.

fields.name: folderId
fields.description: Folder ID or null for uncategorized/root

fields.name: isNew
fields.description: Whether this set is newly created

collections.name: flashcards
collections.description: Individual flashcards belonging to a flashcard set.

fields.name: isLearned
fields.description: Whether owner marked this card as learned

fields.name: sourceCardId
fields.description: Original card ID when copied from another set/share

collections.name: flashcard_progress
collections.description: Per-user spaced-repetition/progress records for flashcards.

fields.name: interval
fields.description: Review interval in days if used

collections.name: vocabulary
collections.description: Cached dictionary/vocabulary lookup records keyed by lowercase term.

fields.name: term
fields.description: Lowercase term used as document ID

collections.name: quizzes
collections.description: Quiz definitions created manually, generated by AI, or copied from friends.

fields.name: questions
fields.description: Question list with id, question, options, correctAnswer, explanation

fields.name: sourceQuizId
fields.description: Original quiz ID when copied from a friend share

collections.name: quiz_rooms
collections.description: Live quiz room records used with Socket.IO classroom rooms.

fields.name: settings
fields.description: Room settings: allowRetry, showAnswers, phoenixRebirth, shuffleQuestions

collections.name: quiz_results
collections.description: Quiz attempt results and evaluated answers.

fields.name: answers
fields.description: User answers keyed by question id

fields.name: roomId
fields.description: Room ID if submitted from a room

collections.name: arena_matchmaking_stats
collections.description: Optional Arena matchmaking telemetry/statistics.

collections.name: community_posts
collections.description: Community/social feed posts.

collections.name: community_comments
collections.description: Comments and replies on community posts.

collections.name: notifications
collections.description: Bell notifications for follows, community actions, friend requests, messages and shares.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Notification type: follow, community_like, community_comment, community_reply, friend_request, friend_accept, friend_message, friend_share, leaderboard, learning_reminder

collections.name: user_follows
collections.description: Follow relationships between users.

collections.name: friend_requests
collections.description: Friend request workflow records.

collections.name: friendships
collections.description: Accepted friend relationships. Document ID is pairId: smallerUid__largerUid.

collections.name: friend_messages
collections.description: Chat messages between friends, including shared flashcard folders and quizzes.

fields.name: share
fields.description: Share payload when type=share: { type, itemId, ownerId, title, summary }

fields.name: savedBy
fields.description: UIDs that saved this shared content

collections.name: notebooks
collections.description: User-owned visual notebooks / whiteboards.

fields.name: pages
fields.description: Page array. Each page includes id, title, background, strokes, items

fields.name: settings
fields.description: Notebook-level settings such as boardWidth and boardHeight

collections.name: users/{uid}/calculatorHistory
collections.description: Per-user calculator history subcollection.

collections.name: users/{uid}/translationHistory
collections.description: Per-user translation history subcollection.

collections.name: users/{uid}/studyMethods
collections.description: Per-user custom study timer methods.

collections.name: users/{uid}/grammar_tests
collections.description: Generated personalized grammar tests saved under each user.

collections.name: users/{uid}/tenses_tests
collections.description: Generated personalized tenses tests saved under each user.

collections.name: leaderboard_weekly
collections.description: Weekly leaderboard rows, document ID is period_uid.

collections.name: leaderboard_monthly
collections.description: Monthly leaderboard rows, document ID is period_uid.

collections.name: user_rewards
collections.description: Reward claim records for leaderboard/periodic rewards.

collections.name: ai_generation_logs
collections.description: Optional AI chat/image generation logs if persistence is enabled.

fields.name: translatedPrompt
fields.description: English prompt sent to image model

fields.name: resultSummary
fields.description: Short result summary, not full private content unless intentionally stored

collections.name: subtitle_jobs
collections.description: Optional subtitle processing job metadata if export history is enabled.

fields.name: srtPreview
fields.description: Short subtitle preview, not necessarily full SRT

notes: This is a schema/blueprint document, not a deployable firestore.rules file.
Several routes use Firebase Admin on the backend, so client-side Firestore rules can be stricter than the permissive examples shown here.
ai_generation_logs and subtitle_jobs are optional because the current AI/subtitle routes do not need persistence unless you want history.
